top_signals.title: Microsoft disrupts Fox Tempest malware-signing-as-a-service platform tied to ransomware gangs
top_signals.summary: The company unsealed a legal case in U.S. District Court on Tuesday detailing the disruption of Fox Tempest — a popular service that has operated since May 2025 and provides cybercriminals with code signing tools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
